text:
きゃっ、思っていたよりも固いのね。
これ噛み切れるのかしら……？

でも私だって伊達に長いこと
厨房で勤めてきたわけじゃないもの！
ハンバーグとかならいけるはず……！

うーん、燃えてきたっ！
さっそく料理にとりかかるわ！
それじゃ、ありがと

Whoa, this is way tougher than I expected.
I don't know if my chompers could even get
through it...

But I haven't been working all this time as a
chef just for show! I think I can make this
work if I just grind it up like a hamburger.

Yeah! Now I just have to get the stove as fired
up as I am. Oh, and thanks again!
